raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Golden State Teacher Grant Program has been funded with $89 million in the state budget.",
    "The program delivers grants to aspiring teachers to help them cover the cost of training needed to enter the classroom.",
    "Grants are targeted to teachers who commit to teach in subject areas with a severe shortage in California, such as bilingual education, special education, and STEM.",
    "California's pipeline of new teachers is currently at a 12-year low.",
    "The number of new credentials issued for teachers in California has dropped by close to 50% in the past 12 years.",
    "The number of waivers issued when schools cannot find a fully-qualified credentialed teacher has nearly doubled over the past five years.",
    "The Golden State Teacher Grant Program will provide a one-time $20,000 grant for prospective teachers who commit to teach for 4 years in hard-to-staff subjects.",
    "Teachers are crucial to the public education system and play a significant role in changing lives."
  ]
}
```
